personas.name: Ana Mondlane
personas.description: 26-year-old recent graduate in Maputo looking for her first professional job. Fluent in Portuguese, conversational English. Uses Android phone primarily, laptop at internet cafés.
motivations: Find a professional job matching her business administration degree
Get email alerts for new opportunities
Manage applications across multiple job listings
frustrations: Slow mobile data makes heavy pages unusable
Not knowing if employers actually see her profile
Spam jobs that waste her time
edge_cases: Unicode characters in name: Mondlane (accents in profile bio)
Very long bio text (500+ chars) to test truncation
Uploading profile photo on slow connection
Concurrent sessions from phone and desktop
Password with special characters: @#$%

needs: high contrast for outdoor mobile use

personas.name: Carlos Sitoe
personas.description: 42-year-old HR manager at a mid-size construction company in Maputo. Posts 3-5 jobs per month. Needs to track applicant interest and manage job visibility. Uses desktop primarily at office.
motivations: Post jobs quickly with minimal friction
Feature important positions for more visibility
Track which jobs get the most views
Edit or deactivate filled positions promptly
frustrations: Complex forms that lose data on timeout
No bulk actions for managing many listings
Unclear payment flow for featuring jobs
Not knowing if job was approved or still pending
edge_cases: Job description with HTML/markdown injection attempts
Salary range with very large numbers (999,999,999 MZN)
Posting a job with all optional fields empty
Posting a job with all optional fields filled
Rapid successive edits to the same job
Deactivating a featured (paid) job - refund handling?

personas.name: Marta Cossa
personas.description: 35-year-old platform administrator. Reviews all submitted jobs, manages user accounts, handles reported content. Works from the office on a large monitor. Power user who values efficiency and keyboard shortcuts.
motivations: Moderate content quickly with bulk actions
Identify and remove spam/fraudulent job posts
Manage user roles and handle escalations
Resolve reported content fairly and promptly
frustrations: No keyboard shortcuts for common admin actions
Having to review jobs one-by-one instead of in bulk
No notification when new reports come in
Unclear audit trail of who approved/rejected what
edge_cases: Bulk-approving 50+ jobs at once
Revoking admin role from self (should be prevented)
Resolving a report for a job that was already deleted
Viewing a user who requested account deletion

personas.name: Anonymous Visitor
personas.description: Unauthenticated user arriving from a search engine or shared link. May be a potential job seeker or employer evaluating the platform. Could be from Mozambique or Mexico.
motivations: Quickly assess if the platform has relevant jobs
Understand what the platform offers before signing up
Access job details from shared links
frustrations: Slow page loads on first visit
edge_cases: Deep-linking to a job that doesn't exist (404 handling)
Deep-linking to a deactivated job
Accessing admin routes without auth
Using the public API programmatically
Navigating with JavaScript disabled
